CustomField.formula: IF (AND ( CONTAINS($Label.ALDSATRecordTypeIds,RecordType.DeveloperName), NOT(ISBLANK( TEXT(External_Case_Category__c))), NOT(ISBLANK( TEXT(External_Case_Detail__c))), NOT(ISBLANK(Vehicle_No__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Vin_No_Contract__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Subsidiary_Indicator__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Mileage__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Subject)), NOT(ISBLANK(Appointment_Date_Time_Option1__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(ContactId)) ) ,True,IF(AND(NOT(ISBLANK(Contact.Email)),NOT(ISBLANK(Contact.Phone)),Force_outbound_synchronization__c =true),True,False))
CustomField.label: ALDSATOCSM
